item.title: Schultz_Report: Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 7min Source: USC WR Makai Lemon is visiting the #Commanders tomorrow after spending Mon
item.description:
Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 7min Source: USC WR Makai Lemon is visiting the #Commanders tomorrow after spending Monday with the #Dolphins.
Lemon is a projected top pick after winning the Biletnikoff last season with the Trojans. 2 27 118 8 mil

item.title:

Where will he take his talents on
item.description:
NFL @NFL · 11min . @OhioStateFB WR Carnell Tate's journey is defined by resilience
Where will he take his talents on Draft night?
2026 NFL Draft – April 23-25 on NFLN/ESPN/ABC Stream on @NFLPlus 6 9 75 28 mil
